title: useConfirm
description: Imperative confirmation dialogs that return a `Promise(boolean)`. Mount ConfirmDialog once near the root; any component can call `useConfirm().confirm()` to await the user's decision.

api.confirm: Open a confirmation dialog and return a promise that resolves `true` on confirm and `false` on cancel or dismiss. Calls are queued so only one dialog is visible at a time.

input.title: Heading shown at the top of the dialog.
input.hideCancel: When `true`, removes the cancel button turning the dialog into an alert.
input.dismissable: Allow closing via overlay click or Escape.

playground.title: Confirm action
playground.description: Are you sure you want to proceed?

basic.title: Danger confirm
basic.desc: Destructive operations should use `color: 'danger'` and a clear description.

alert.title: Alert dialog
alert.desc: Use `hideCancel: true` when you only need an acknowledgement, not a decision.

chain.title: Chained confirms
chain.desc: Because `confirm()` returns a Promise, you can chain multiple steps and bail out early on cancel.
